zh.Harley, Shropshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾哈爾
zh.Willey, Shropshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Burga de Willey於大約1245年出生在英國史洛普爾維爾時，她的父親Andreas De Willey16歲，母親Grace Hungerford21歲。她於大約1280年與Richard de Harley結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年之後。

zh-hans.Harley, Shropshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰史洛普爾哈爾
zh-hans.Willey, Shropshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰史洛普爾維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Burga de Willey于大约1245年出生在英国史洛普爾維爾时，她的父亲Andreas De Willey16岁，母亲Grace Hungerford21岁。她于大约1280年与Richard de Harley结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name   Will  , a short form of   William  . In some instances a variant of   Wiley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Willi  .

History: Isaac Willey is recorded in Boston, MA, in 1640, and went on to be one of the founders of New London, CT. His descendent Samuel Hopkins Willey (1821–1914) was one of the founders of the College of California at Berkeley in 1860.

variants.name: Willie
meanings: Native American (e.g. Navajo and Seminole): adoption of the English personal name Willie (pet form of William ) as a surname.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Burga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘inaccessible’, an epithet of the wife of Shiva, because of her propensity for prolonged meditation. Durga represents her terrifying form, reflecting her anger when disturbed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Burga de Willey was born about 1245, in Willey, Shropshire, England, her father, Andreas De Willey, was 16 and her mother, Grace Hungerford, was 21. She married Richard de Harley about 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1331.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Burga de Willey est née environ 1245, à Willey, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Andreas De Willey, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Grace Hungerford, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Harley environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1331.

de.lifeSummary: Als Burga de Willey um 1245 in Willey, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andreas De Willey 16 und ihre Mutter Grace Hungerford 21. Sie hat um 1280 Richard de Harley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1331.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Burga de Willey è nata il circa 1245 nel Willey, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Andreas De Willey, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Grace Hungerford, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Harley circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1331.

ja.lifeSummary: Burga de Willeyが約1245年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィリーで生まれた時，父Andreas De Willeyは16歳，母Grace Hungerfordは21歳であった。約1280年にRichard de Harleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Burga de Willey(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 슈럽실르 윌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andreas De Willey(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Hungerford(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 Richard de Harley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Burga de Willey nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Willey, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andreas De Willey, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Grace Hungerford, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Harley aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1331.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Burga de Willey родилась около 1245 г. в местности уилли, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Andreas De Willey было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Hungerford, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Harley около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1331 г.

sm.Abt 1245–after 1331: e tusa o le 1245–ina ua ma'ea le 1331

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Burga de Willey nació aproximadamente 1245, en Willey, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Andreas De Willey, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Grace Hungerford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richard de Harley aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1331.
